allow: PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser -Force; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri https://get.scoop.sh | Invoke-Expression)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\shims;$env:Path"; Start-Process php -ArgumentList '-S','localhost:8000','-t','.' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\____WORK\\MEDRAD\\medrad-site' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/src/index.php' -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes"; "HAS <footer>: $\($r.Content -match '<footer'\)"; "HAS hero: $\($r.Content -match 'entry__headline'\)"; "PHP errors: $\(if \($r.Content -match 'Fatal error|Warning:|Notice:'\) {'FOUND'} else {'none'}\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('/src/styles.css','/assets/images/logo.svg','/script.js','/assets/images/aboutek.png'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000$u" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head; "$u  ->  $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u  ->  FAIL $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } })

PowerShell($css = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/src/styles.css' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "reviews-summary__stars svg: $\(if \($css -match 'reviews-summary__stars svg'\) {'present'} else {'MISSING'}\)"; "review-card__stars svg: $\(if \($css -match 'review-card__stars svg'\) {'present'} else {'MISSING'}\)"; "reviews-section: $\(if \($css -match '\\.reviews-section'\) {'present'} else {'MISSING'}\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\shims;$env:Path"; php -l "C:\\____WORK\\MEDRAD\\medrad-site\\src\\typography.php" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 1; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/typography.php' -UseBasicParsing; "typography.php -> $\($r.StatusCode\), has table: $\($r.Content -match 'type-table'\)" } catch { "FAIL: $_" })
Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m 'Refine typography module; stop tracking compiled CSS' -m '- typography.scss: one element + one reusable class per rule *)
Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m 'Add colour, spacing & breakpoint token system + utility classes' -m '- colors.scss: palette map, color\(\) fn, :root vars, .text-/.bg-/.border- utilities *)

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('/','/index.php','/styles.css','/preview/','/preview/typography.php','/preview/colors.php','/preview/spacing.php'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000$u" -UseBasicParsing; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\)b\)" } catch { "$u -> FAIL" } })
Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m 'Restructure src/: styles/ folder + per-section folders' -m '- styles/ holds the global styles flat \(breakpoints, colors, spacing, *)
Bash(sed -i "s#/../shared/head\\.php#/../shared/head/head.php#g; s#src/shared/#src/styles/#g" src/preview/index.php src/preview/typography.php src/preview/colors.php src/preview/spacing.php)

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('/','/styles.css','/preview/','/preview/typography.php','/preview/colors.php','/preview/spacing.php'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000$u" -UseBasicParsing; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u -> FAIL" } })
Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m 'Organize shared/ into per-component folders; fix preview page links' -m '- shared/<name>/<name>.php\(.scss\) — head, header, footer each in own folder *)
Bash(sed -i '1,2c\\// Atoms — container, text-link, card \(+ contact-path surfaces\).\\n// Composed from tokens only. Buttons + form controls -> forms.scss.' src/styles/atoms.scss)

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('/','/styles.css','/preview/'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000$u" -UseBasicParsing; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\)b\)" } catch { "$u -> FAIL" } })

Bash(git -c core.autocrlf=false commit -m 'Add radius/shadow/transition tokens + forms.scss; reorganize atoms' -m '- new token files: radius.scss, shadow.scss, transitions.scss \(moved out of foundation\) *)
